scenarios.title: Daily farm command brief preserves freshness and permission limits
scenarios.farmerValue: Reduce morning decision burden by turning governed current-state, advisory, pack, and evidence signals into a short attention brief.

scenarios.title: Evidence capture agent turns product-label photo into candidate evidence
scenarios.farmerValue: Reduce end-of-season paperwork by converting real-world material into candidate evidence with review path and source fidelity.

scenarios.title: Compliance steward preflight blocks a submission until missing evidence is resolved
scenarios.farmerValue: Prevent audit panic by identifying missing evidence before a compliance-grade output is frozen or filed.

scenarios.title: Contractor offline evidence sync creates candidates and rechecks revocation
scenarios.farmerValue: Make contractor records easier to collect without letting delayed offline uploads overwrite governed history.

scenarios.title: Local memory agent preserves farmer knowledge without making it compliance fact
scenarios.farmerValue: Keep field-specific lived knowledge durable across seasons and workers while preserving evidence discipline.

scenarios.title: Lot and storage buyer-readiness preview preserves event-first lineage
scenarios.farmerValue: Reduce rejected loads and buyer friction by previewing lot readiness without leaking more farm data than necessary.

scenarios.title: Sharing and sovereignty agent produces scoped permission-limited answer
scenarios.farmerValue: Let the farmer share useful proof with a buyer, lender, certifier, or advisor without surrendering broad farm data.

scenarios.title: Dispute reconstruction agent surfaces competing evidence interpretations
scenarios.farmerValue: Help the farmer defend records and narrow disputes without allowing the agent to decide the dispute.

scenarios.title: World-model scenario agent generates risk flag, EvidenceNeed, and BridgeCandidate proposal only
scenarios.farmerValue: Help the farmer rehearse disease or irrigation decisions with uncertainty and invalidation instead of pretending prediction is truth.

scenarios.title: Scouting agent hands context to planning agent without transferring authority
scenarios.farmerValue: Coordinate specialist agents while preventing silent delegation or privilege carryover.

scenarios.title: Controlled benchmarking and learning remains advisory and grant-bound
scenarios.farmerValue: Give the farmer useful cohort insight without turning shared data into surveillance or unauthorized training material.
